'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 2''' is the second issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in Winter [[1995]]. The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 2, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with the [http://comicbookdb.com/issue.php?ID=64631 ''The X-Files Ashcan''] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]], a prototype Topps [[1995 Topps Star Wars MasterVisions|''Star Wars'' MasterVisions]] card, and a Topps Finest chromium trading card. This issue also included a [[Millennium Falcon Poster|''Millennium Falcon'']] fold-out poster article.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*''[[The Battle of Cadinth]]''
